meta.title: DEF CON 32 - Porn & Privacy - ET
meta.description: As our social lives are highly intertwined with our online lives, people share a lot of information and create pictures and content that needs to be secured. In this talk I cover obscenity laws, revenge porn (nonconsensual distribution of intimate images), stalking, catfishing and sextortion and how people can prevent information being leaked as well as how to recover from it.
